name: Fermented Fruit Starter (Friendship Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not drain the fruit.
2. Combine peaches and 2-1/2 cups sugar with yeast in a 1-gallon glass or crockery jar with a loose fitting lid. Stir to mix.
3. Stir the mixture daily for 10 days.
4. On the 10th day, add pineapple and 2-1/2 cups sugar. Stir the mixture daily for another 10 days.
5. Add cherries, fruit cocktail, and remaining sugar. Stir the mixture daily for a further 10 days.
6. Drain the fruit, reserving the juice for the next batch. This will make enough fruit for 4 cakes.
7. To make more starter, use 1-1/2 cups of starter juice instead of yeast with peaches and sugar.
